pre_game.message: Hey, I’m F. It’s a bit of a squeeze in here with all of us, isn't it? How are you holding up with the anticipation for the game?
Nice to meet you, F. I'm A. It definitely is! I'm a bit restless, honestly—just really eager to get started. How are you holding up?
I'm feeling the same way, A. A bit of nerves, but mostly just focused—I've got some important people back home I'm hoping to help out with this.
I completely get that. I'm in the same boat, actually—having people counting on you makes it feel like more than just a game.
It really does. It makes every decision feel a lot heavier. Who are you playing for, if you don't mind me asking?
My family, mostly. I just want to make sure they're taken care of and don't have to worry about the future. What about you?
Pretty much the same—my parents and my younger brother. They've worked so hard, and I just want to give them some breathing room and a bit of security.
That’s a great reason to be here. It’s a lot of pressure, but I guess it’s the best kind of motivation, right?
Absolutely. When it's for them, you can't help but give it your all. Have you thought much about how you're going to play this?
I’m still figuring that out, but I’m hoping to find a balance between playing smart for my family and being fair to the right people. Good luck to you and your family, F!
Thanks, A. I really appreciate that. Let's hope we can both make our families proud. Good luck to you too!

post_game.message: Thanks for being a fair player. It was a pleasure to see everyone get their $10,000.
You're very welcome. It was a pleasure collaborating with you to ensure everyone walked away with their $10,000.
